channel.title: bigdata on Articles, Translations, and Blog
channel.description: Recent content in bigdata on Articles, Translations, and Blog

item.title: AWK vs Big Data
item.description: Don’t sleep on the basics. Someone probably solved your problem in the 80s. There’s been a lot of talk about big data recently. Lots of people just shove data into whatever software is currently all the rage (think Hadoop some time ago, Spark, etc) and get excited with results that actually aren’t that amazing. You can get very decent results by using the standard data processing toolset (awk/grep/sed/sort/xargs/find) paired with understanding of what data you process and how the software works.
